positive: A breathtaking symmetrical mandala composition featuring bioluminescent tropical flora and fauna, integrated with stylized celestial elements like crescent moons and constellations. The design should use deep indigo, emerald green, electric cyan, and glowing gold accents. Focus on intricate, clean line art combined with solid, vibrant color blocks. The composition must be circular and perfectly centered, optimized for textile printing. Style: Highly detailed vector illustration, mandalic symmetry, glowing neon luminescence, Ukiyo-e inspired elegance. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic ethereal glow. Ensure perfect clean silhouettes suitable for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, grayscale, photo, low detail, watermark, signature, text, words, logo, dirty, rough, cropped, artifact, jpeg artifacts, grain, noise, poorly rendered
